response.justification: Candidate fails to meet multiple mandatory requirements. Only ~6 months of documented professional C++ experience (vs. 5-10 years required), no Windows platform expertise, limited SQL/database background focused on MongoDB rather than SQL Server/Oracle, and no financial services or fixed income domain knowledge. Recent 5-year career trajectory (TypeScript/Node.js) shows drift away from C++, and current career gap since October 2025 adds further concerns.
strengths: Excellent communication skills demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and courses taught to professional audiences
Strong software engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD pipeline setup, and clean code practices
Polyglot developer with Java experience and diverse technical background across multiple domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented professional C++ experience, far below the mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No Windows platform development experience mentioned; recent work entirely on TypeScript/Node.js stack
Zero demonstrated financial services, fixed income, or capital markets domain expertise; recent non-financial roles do not fulfill domain requirements
